en: What? Wake up, come and have a chat.
Why? I've got something important to ask you.
Can it wait till morning? Not really.

ko: 그건 안 돼. 아, 너무 편해.
정말 아름다운 꿈을 꾸고 있었어. 뭐야?

en: What is it? Why is there music on?
It's got something to do with what I want to ask you.
ko: 내가 너에게 묻고 싶은 것과 관련이 있어. 잠깐만.

en: Guy with important question. Are you on your knees?

ko: 무릎 꿇고 있어? 무릎 꿇고 있어.

en: Were you so bored in the play, you decided to ask me to marry you afterwards?
